target.title: Trim app caches on memory pressure
target.body:
## Summary

Trims rebuildable app caches when the existing memory-pressure monitor fires.

This is stacked on #1575. Until #1575 merges, GitHub may show the WebView memory-pressure commits in this PR's diff as well.

## What changed

- Adds a memory-pressure cache trim callback to `MemoryPressureMonitor`.
- Wires `AppDelegate` into that callback so pressure handling also trims app-level caches.
- Clears rebuildable menu sizing/content caches and the transient menu-card recycle pool.
- Clears the OpenAI web debug ring buffer while leaving provider/session/auth/refresh state intact.
- Logs trim counts when anything was released.
- Adds a DEBUG-only distributed notification proof hook so a local debug app can simulate the memory-pressure path and emit runtime trim-count logs without changing release behavior.

## Why

Low-memory machines benefit from releasing cached UI/debug data as soon as macOS reports memory pressure. These caches are local and rebuildable, so trimming them does not force provider probes, drop credentials, cancel refreshes, or clear usage snapshots.

## Proof

- Built-app runtime proof, local debug app launched from `/Users/alec/Dev/CodexBar/CodexBar.app/Contents/MacOS/CodexBar` after copying in the freshly built debug executable from `.build/debug/CodexBar`.
  - Posted a DEBUG-only distributed notification to simulate warning-level memory pressure with seeded rebuildable caches:
    - `/usr/bin/swift -e 'import Foundation; DistributedNotificationCenter.default().postNotificationName(Notification.Name("com.steipete.codexbar.debug.simulateMemoryPressure"), object: nil, userInfo: ["level": "warning", "seedCaches": "1"], deliverImmediately: true)'`
  - App log proof from `/Users/alec/Library/Logs/CodexBar/CodexBar.log`:
    - `[2026-06-16T18:04:43.347Z] [INFO] com.steipete.codexbar.memory-pressure: Debug memory pressure notification received level=warning seedCaches=1`
    - `[2026-06-16T18:04:43.348Z] [WARNING] com.steipete.codexbar.memory-pressure: System memory pressure level=warning`
    - `[2026-06-16T18:04:43.349Z] [INFO] com.steipete.codexbar.memory-pressure: Trimmed app caches for memory pressure menuCardHeights=1 menuWidths=1 mergedSwitcherSelections=2 openAIWebDebugLines=2 recycledMenuCardViews=1 total=7`
- `swift test --filter MemoryPressureCacheTrimTests`
  - 3 tests passed.
  - Proves the monitor invokes the app trim handler.
  - Proves menu cache counts before/after: 1 height cache, 1 width cache, 2 merged switcher selections, 1 recycled menu-card view trimmed to empty.
  - Proves OpenAI web debug lines before/after: 3 debug lines trimmed to empty while `isRefreshing`, `refreshingProviders`, `tokenRefreshInFlight`, refresh key, and refresh token stay unchanged.
- `swift test --filter OpenAIDashboardWebViewCacheTests`
  - 19 tests passed after 1.895 seconds.
  - Reconfirms the same memory-pressure path still evicts idle shared WebViews without interrupting busy WebViews.
- `swift build --build-tests`
  - Passed.
- `swiftlint --strict`
  - 0 violations, 0 serious in 1141 files.
- `swiftformat Sources/CodexBar/MemoryPressureMonitor.swift Sources/CodexBar/CodexbarApp.swift Sources/CodexBar/Notifications+CodexBar.swift Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController.swift Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+MemoryPressure.swift Sources/CodexBar/UsageStore+MemoryPressure.swift Tests/CodexBarTests/MemoryPressureCacheTrimTests.swift`
  - Completed cleanly.
- `git diff --check`
  - Passed.
target.author: prospectore
